tools.Name: Scientific Agent Skills
tools.Description: A comprehensive collection of 135 ready-to-use skills for AI agents, covering genomics, drug discovery, and data analysis.
tools.Use_Case: Automating complex, multi-step scientific research workflows and data analysis pipelines using AI agents.

tools.Name: CloakBrowser
tools.Description: A stealth Chromium binary designed to pass bot detection at the source level using C++ patches.
tools.Use_Case: Reliable web scraping and browser automation that bypasses advanced anti-bot systems like Cloudflare Turnstile and reCAPTCHA v3.

tools.Name: PraisonAI
tools.Description: A framework for building autonomous, self-improving multi-agent systems with built-in memory and RAG.
tools.Use_Case: Deploying autonomous agent workforces for tasks like research, coding, and business workflow automation.
